# Select and gate top-k expert groups

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This mixture-of-experts translation keeps routing scores, indices, counts, and expert values in tile operations.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/moe/topk_gate_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/moe/topk_gate_kernel.py) |
| Pinned revision | `36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5` |
| C++ function | `topk_gate` |
| Verification | `source-validated` |
| Minimum thread fragment | 128 bytes |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="topk_gate_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
template <int NumTokens, int NumExperts, int NumTopk, int TileN = 8>
void topk_gate(float *scores, std::int32_t *topk_idx) {
    static_assert(NumTopk <= NumExperts, "num_topk <= num_experts");
    static_assert(NumExperts % 8 == 0, "NumExperts must be multiple of 8");
    static_assert(TileN % 4 == 0, "TileN must be multiple of 4");
    constexpr int kTN = NumTokens / TileN;
    using namespace pto;
    using gm_s = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumExperts>>;
    using gm_i = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;
    using tile_s = LocalTile< float, TileN, NumExperts, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_i = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileN, NumExperts, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_v = LocalTile< float, TileN, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileN, 1>;
    using tile_iv = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileN, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileN, 1>;
    using it_s = global_iterator<gm_s, tile_s>;
    using it_i = global_iterator<gm_i, tile_iv>;
    it_s s_iter(scores); it_i o_iter(topk_idx);

    for (int tn = 0; tn < kTN; ++tn) {
        auto gin = s_iter(tn, 0);
        tile_s S; TLOAD(S, gin);

        tile_i Iraw, Irem; TCI(Iraw, 0); TREMS(Irem, Iraw, NumExperts);
        tile_s I; TCVT(I, Irem);
        for (int k = 0; k < NumTopk; ++k) {

            tile_v mx; TROWMAX(mx, S);
            tile_s diff; TROWEXPANDSUB(diff, S, mx);
            tile_s zero, is_max; TEXPANDS(zero, 0.0f);
            TCMP(is_max, diff, zero);

            tile_s n1, rev, picked; TEXPANDS(n1, static_cast<float>(NumExperts - 1));
            TSUB(rev, n1, I);
            TEXPANDS(picked, -1.0f);
            TSEL(picked, is_max, rev);

            tile_v best_rev; TROWMAX(best_rev, picked);
            tile_v n1v, best_idx_f; TEXPANDS(n1v, static_cast<float>(NumExperts - 1));
            TSUB(best_idx_f, n1v, best_rev);

            tile_iv best_idx_i; TCVT(best_idx_i, best_idx_f);
            auto gout = o_iter(tn, k); TSTORE(gout, best_idx_i);

            tile_s best_bc; TROWEXPAND(best_bc, best_idx_f);
            tile_s is_pick; TCMP(is_pick, I, best_bc);
            tile_s neg_inf; TEXPANDS(neg_inf, -std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity());
            TSEL(S, is_pick, neg_inf);
        }
    }
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load a routing fragment, apply selection, counting, normalization, gather, or reduction stages, and store the fragment in token-major or expert-major order.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TCI`](../../../intrinsics/tci.md), [`TCMP`](../../../intrinsics/tcmp.md), [`TCVT`](../../../intrinsics/tcvt.md), [`TEXPANDS`](../../../intrinsics/texpands.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TREMS`](../../../intrinsics/trems.md), [`TROWEXPAND`](../../../intrinsics/trowexpand.md), [`TROWEXPANDSUB`](../../../intrinsics/trowexpandsub.md), [`TROWMAX`](../../../intrinsics/trowmax.md), [`TSEL`](../../../intrinsics/tsel.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md), [`TSUB`](../../../intrinsics/tsub.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition tokens or experts; threads own disjoint routing fragments of at least 128 bytes and derive their coordinates from execution identity.

## Memory and tile flow

Scores and indices are loaded into typed tiles, transformed through the routing pipeline, and committed through regular or indexed tile memory operations.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

    #ifndef SUPERNPU_TOPK_GATE_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_TOPK_GATE_PTO_HPP
    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>
    #include <limits>

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <int NumTokens, int NumExperts, int NumTopk, int TileN = 8>
    void topk_gate(float *scores, std::int32_t *topk_idx) {
        static_assert(NumTopk <= NumExperts, "num_topk <= num_experts");
        static_assert(NumExperts % 8 == 0, "NumExperts must be multiple of 8");
        static_assert(TileN % 4 == 0, "TileN must be multiple of 4");
        constexpr int kTN = NumTokens / TileN;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm_s = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumExperts>>;
        using gm_i = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;
        using tile_s = LocalTile< float, TileN, NumExperts, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_i = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileN, NumExperts, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_v = LocalTile< float, TileN, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileN, 1>;
        using tile_iv = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileN, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileN, 1>;
        using it_s = global_iterator<gm_s, tile_s>;
        using it_i = global_iterator<gm_i, tile_iv>;
        it_s s_iter(scores); it_i o_iter(topk_idx);

        for (int tn = 0; tn < kTN; ++tn) {
            auto gin = s_iter(tn, 0);
            tile_s S; TLOAD(S, gin);

            tile_i Iraw, Irem; TCI(Iraw, 0); TREMS(Irem, Iraw, NumExperts);
            tile_s I; TCVT(I, Irem);
            for (int k = 0; k < NumTopk; ++k) {

                tile_v mx; TROWMAX(mx, S);
                tile_s diff; TROWEXPANDSUB(diff, S, mx);
                tile_s zero, is_max; TEXPANDS(zero, 0.0f);
                TCMP(is_max, diff, zero);

                tile_s n1, rev, picked; TEXPANDS(n1, static_cast<float>(NumExperts - 1));
                TSUB(rev, n1, I);
                TEXPANDS(picked, -1.0f);
                TSEL(picked, is_max, rev);

                tile_v best_rev; TROWMAX(best_rev, picked);
                tile_v n1v, best_idx_f; TEXPANDS(n1v, static_cast<float>(NumExperts - 1));
                TSUB(best_idx_f, n1v, best_rev);

                tile_iv best_idx_i; TCVT(best_idx_i, best_idx_f);
                auto gout = o_iter(tn, k); TSTORE(gout, best_idx_i);

                tile_s best_bc; TROWEXPAND(best_bc, best_idx_f);
                tile_s is_pick; TCMP(is_pick, I, best_bc);
                tile_s neg_inf; TEXPANDS(neg_inf, -std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity());
                TSEL(S, is_pick, neg_inf);
            }
        }
    }

    }
    #endif
